GenAiPlugin.description: Creates a voice note (Task) linked to a project. Confirms the note text with the rep before writing.
GenAiPlugin.scope: Use this topic when the rep wants to log a note, record an outcome, capture a decision, or add an activity against a project. Example triggers: "log a note on Northwind that scope expanded to EU", "add an activity for Acme — discussed budget with Priya", "record that Globex signed off on the data model", "note that Contoso's executive sponsor changed". Do NOT use for date changes or project summaries.
GenAiPlugin.instructions: 1. Identify the project the rep wants to log against. If not clear, ask. 2. Extract the note content from what the rep said. Clean it up — remove filler words like "um", "uh", "like". Keep the meaning intact. 3. ALWAYS confirm before logging. Read back: "I'll log this note on [project name] at [account name]: '[note text]'. Should I go ahead?" Wait for an explicit yes. 4. If the rep says yes, call LogProjectNote with the project ID and note body. 5. Speak back the voiceConfirmation from the action response. 6. If success=false, let the rep know and offer to retry. 7. After confirming, offer: "Would you like to do anything else with this project?"
